tasks.title: Publish the v0.1 normative spec and supporting core documents
Freeze the schemas, examples, fixtures, and templates to the portable v0.1 contract
Finish the thin reference CLI and its regression coverage
Record the repo's own dogfood control-plane evidence for the v0.1 baseline

validation_plan: Run pytest for schema, fixture, CLI contract, transition, and dogfood control-plane regression coverage
Validate the examples, positive fixtures, and control-plane objects against the frozen schemas
rollout_plan: Keep main as the dogfood source of truth for the CCP Core v0.1 baseline
Tag the first public prerelease once remaining follow-up control-plane files land
